import { useState } from "react"; export default function RegisterPage({ setPage }) { const [showPass, setShowPass] = useState(false); const [showConfirm, setShowConfirm] = useState(false); const [role, setRole] = useState("user"); const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: "", email: "", password: "", confirm: "" }); const set = (k) => (e) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [k]: e.target.value })); const handleSignup = () => { if (role === "chef") return setPage("chef-dashboard"); setPage("user-dashboard"); }; return (
